mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO feedback_msg_info ( feedback_msg_id, create_time, create_user, is_handle, is_assign, assign_user, handle_user, handle_time ) VALUES
( #{item.feedbackMsgId}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.createUser}, #{item.isHandle}, #{item.isAssign}, #{item.assignUser}, #{item.handleUser}, #{item.handleTime} )
